revision.text: #redirect[[en:Simple_Hot_Springs]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

'''単純温泉'''（たんじゅんせん）は、掲示用泉質名に基づく[[温泉]]の[[泉質]]の分類の一種。
== 概要 == 旧泉質名では単純泉、新泉質名では単純温泉、アルカリ性単純温泉と呼ばれる。温泉水1kg中の溶存物質の含有量が少ない温泉が該当する。含有成分量が少ないことにより、皮膚への刺激が少ないことが特徴。またメタけい酸含有量による規定泉も単純温泉として取り扱われるため、[[水素イオン指数|pH]]が非常に高い温泉が存在するのも特徴である。
== 泉質の定義 == [[温泉法]]による規定を満たした温泉のうち、温泉1kg中に含まれる溶存物質の含有量が総量1000mg未満のもの。
== 効能 == 泉質に基づく効能として、以下が挙げられる。 * 一般適応症 ''※[[効能]]はその効果を万人に保障するものではない''
== 代表的な温泉地 == * [[伊東温泉]] * [[奥津温泉]] * [[由布院温泉]]
== 関連項目 == {{ウィキポータルリンク|温泉}} *[[温泉]]、[[温泉街]]、[[外湯]]、[[温泉番付]] *[[日本の温泉地一覧]] - [[日本の温泉画像一覧]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:たんしゆんおんせん}} [[Category:温泉]]

revision.text:
'''単純温泉'''（たんじゅんおんせん）は、掲示用泉質名に基づく[[温泉]]の[[泉質]]の分類の一種。
== 概要 == 温泉水1kg中の溶存物質の含有量が少ない温泉が該当する。含有成分量が少ないことにより、皮膚への刺激が少ないことが特徴。またメタけい酸含有量による規定泉も単純温泉として取り扱われるため、[[水素イオン指数|pH]]が非常に高い温泉が存在するのも特徴である。
== 新旧泉質名との対比 == 新旧泉質名では、以下に分類される。
=== 旧泉質名 === * 単純泉
=== 新泉質名 === * 単純温泉 : 泉質が[[中性]]～[[酸性泉]]に至らない[[酸性]]を示すもの * アルカリ性単純温泉 : 泉質が[[アルカリ性]]を示すもの
== 泉質の定義 == [[温泉法]]による規定を満たした温泉のうち、温泉1kg中に含まれる溶存物質の含有量が総量1000mg未満のもの。
== 効能 == 泉質に基づく効能として、以下が挙げられる。 * [[一般的適応症]] ''※[[効能]]はその効果を万人に保障するものではない''

revision.comment: [[温泉#単純温泉]]を参考に概要加筆。
revision.text:
'''単純温泉'''（たんじゅんおんせん）は、掲示用泉質名に基づく[[温泉]]の[[泉質]]の分類の一種。
== 概要 == 温泉水1kg中の溶存物質の含有量が1g未満の温泉が該当する。含有成分量が少ないことにより、刺激が少なく肌にやさしい。概ね無色透明で無味無臭。
単純温泉は成分の少ない単なる湯、質の低い温泉だと誤解されやすい。単純温泉とは、成分の含有量だけを評価したものであり成分の種類について規定したものではない。よって単純温泉とひとくくりにしても個々の泉質は多岐にわたるため単純な比較・分類はできない。成分の組成比によって、各種泉質の性質を帯びることもあるし、様々な成分を少量ずつ含んだバランスの良い泉質となっているものもある。
== 新旧泉質名との対比 == 新旧泉質名では、以下に分類される。
=== 旧泉質名 === * 単純温泉
=== 新泉質名 === * 単純温泉 : 泉質が[[中性]]～[[酸性泉]]に至らない[[酸性]]を示すもの。pH8.5未満。 * アルカリ性単純温泉 : 泉質が[[アルカリ性]]を示すもの。pH8.5以上。
== 泉質の定義 == [[温泉法]]による規定を満たした温泉のうち、温泉1kg中に含まれる溶存物質の含有量が総量1000mg未満のもの。

== 泉質の定義 == [[温泉法]]による規定を満たした温泉のうち、温泉1kg中に含まれる溶存物質の含有量が総量1000mg未満のもの。

{{温泉}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:たんしゆんおんせん}} [[Category:温泉の泉質‎]]

'''単純温泉'''（たんじゅんおんせん）は、掲示用泉質名に基づく[[温泉]]の[[泉質]]の分類の一種である。
== 概要 == 温泉水1kg中の溶存物質の含有量が1g未満の温泉が該当する。含有成分量が少ないことにより、刺激が少なく肌にやさしい。概ね無色透明で無味無臭。
単純温泉は成分の少ない単なる湯、質の低い温泉だと誤解されやすい。単純温泉とは、成分の含有量だけを評価したものであり成分の種類について規定したものではない。よって単純温泉とひとくくりにしても個々の泉質は多岐にわたるため単純な比較・分類はできない。成分の組成比によって、各種泉質の性質を帯びることもあるし、様々な成分を少量ずつ含んだバランスの良い泉質となっているものもある。
== 新旧泉質名との対比 == 新旧泉質名では、以下に分類される。
=== 旧泉質名 === * 単純温泉

== 泉質の定義 == [[温泉法]]による規定を満たした温泉のうち、温泉1kg中に含まれる溶存物質の含有量が総量1000mg未満のもの。
== 効能 == 泉質に基づく効能として、以下が挙げられる。 * [[一般的適応症]]

{| class="wikitable" |+ 新旧泉質名の対応<ref>{{Cite web| |title=参考資料２新旧泉質名対照 |url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf |format=PDF |publisher=環境省自然環境局自然環境整備課温泉地保護利用推進室 |accessdate=2018-03-26 }}</ref> ! scope="col" id="旧泉質名" | 旧泉質名 ! scope="col" id="新泉質名" | 新泉質名 ! scope="col" id="液性" | 液性 |- | 単純温泉 || 単純温泉 || [[水素イオン指数|pH]]8.5未満。泉質は概ね[[中性 (酸塩基)|中性]]〜弱[[アルカリ性]]を示す。 |- | 単純温泉 || アルカリ性単純温泉 || pH8.5以上。泉質がアルカリ性を示すもの。 |}
== 泉質の定義 == [[温泉法]]による規定を満たした温泉のうち、温泉1kg中に含まれる溶存物質の含有量が総量1000mg未満のもの。
== 効能 == 泉質に基づく効能として、以下が挙げられる。 * [[一般的適応症]]
== 脚注 == <references />

{{DEFAULTSORT:たんしゆんおんせん}} [[Category:温泉の泉質]]

{{単一の出典|date=2018年8月12日 (日) 19:26 (UTC)}} '''単純温泉'''（たんじゅんおんせん）は、掲示用泉質名に基づく[[温泉]]の[[泉質]]の分類の一種。[[温泉#療養泉|療養泉]]に分類される泉質である。
== 概要 == 温泉水1kg中の溶存[[物質]]の含有量が1g未満の温泉が該当する。含有[[成分]]量が少ないことにより、刺激が少なく肌にやさしい。概ね無色透明で無味無臭。
単純温泉は成分の少ない単なる湯、質の低い温泉だと誤解されやすい。単純温泉とは、成分の含有量だけを評価したものであり成分の種類について規定したものではない。よって単純温泉とひとくくりにしても個々の泉質は多岐にわたるため単純な比較・分類はできない。成分の組成比によって、各種泉質の性質を帯びることもあるし、様々な成分を少量ずつ含んだバランスの良い泉質となっているものもある。
単純温泉と分類されるものの中には、[[モール泉]]も存在している。
== 新旧泉質名との対比 == 新旧泉質名では、以下に分類される。
{| class="wikitable" |+ 新旧泉質名の対応<ref>{{Cite web| |title=参考資料２新旧泉質名対照 |url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf |format=PDF |publisher=環境省自然環境局自然環境整備課温泉地保護利用推進室 |accessdate=2018-03-26 }}</ref> ! scope="col" id="旧泉質名" | 旧泉質名 ! scope="col" id="新泉質名" | 新泉質名 ! scope="col" id="液性" | 液性 |- | 単純温泉 || 単純温泉 || [[水素イオン指数|pH]]8.5未満。泉質は概ね[[中性 (酸塩基)|中性]]〜弱[[アルカリ性]]を示す。 |- | 単純温泉 || アルカリ性単純温泉 || pH8.5以上。泉質がアルカリ性を示すもの。 |}
== 泉質の定義 == [[温泉法]]による規定を満たした温泉のうち、温泉1kg中に含まれる溶存物質の含有量が総量1000mg未満のもの。
== 効能 == 泉質に基づく効能として、以下が挙げられる。 * [[一般的適応症]]
== 代表的な温泉地 == * [[箱根湯本温泉]]（神奈川県） * [[塩原温泉]]（栃木県） * [[伊東温泉]]（静岡県）
== 脚注 == <references />
<!-- == 関連項目 == -->
{{温泉}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:たんしゆんおんせん}} [[Category:温泉の泉質]]

{{単一の出典|date=2018年8月12日 (日) 19:26 (UTC)}} '''単純温泉'''（たんじゅんおんせん）は、掲示用泉質名に基づく[[温泉]]の[[泉質]]の分類の一種。[[温泉#療養泉|療養泉]]に分類される泉質である。
== 概要 == 温泉水1kg中の溶存[[物質]]の含有量が1g未満の温泉が該当する。含有[[成分]]量が少ないことにより、刺激が少なく肌にやさしい。概ね無色透明で無味無臭。
単純温泉は成分の少ない単なる湯、質の低い温泉だと誤解されやすい。単純温泉とは、成分の含有量だけを評価したものであり成分の種類について規定したものではない。よって単純温泉とひとくくりにしても個々の泉質は多岐にわたるため単純な比較・分類はできない。成分の組成比によって、各種泉質の性質を帯びることもあるし、様々な成分を少量ずつ含んだバランスの良い泉質となっているものもある。
逆断層・正断層に分類される活断層がある地域では強いアルカリ性の単純温泉が見られることが多い。これは断層の岩盤が僅かに負の電荷を帯び、お湯が断層の隙間を通る中で陰イオンが交換されることによるという。
単純温泉と分類されるものの中には、[[モール泉]]も存在している。
== 新旧泉質名との対比 == 新旧泉質名では、以下に分類される。

== 泉質の定義 == [[温泉法]]による規定を満たした温泉のうち、温泉1kg中に含まれる溶存物質の含有量が総量1000mg未満のもの。
== 効能 == 泉質に基づく効能として、以下が挙げられる。 * [[一般的適応症]]
== 代表的な温泉地 == *[[小原温泉]]（宮城県） *[[飯坂温泉]]（福島県） *[[土湯温泉]]（福島県） * [[箱根湯本温泉]]（神奈川県） * [[塩原温泉]]（栃木県） * [[伊東温泉]]（静岡県） * [[浅間温泉]]（長野県） * [[道後温泉]]（愛媛県）

== 代表的な温泉地 == *[[小原温泉]]（宮城県） *[[飯坂温泉]]（福島県） *[[土湯温泉]]（福島県） * [[箱根湯本温泉]]（神奈川県） * [[塩原温泉]]（栃木県） * [[伊東温泉]]（静岡県） * [[浅間温泉]]（長野県） * [[道後温泉]]（愛媛県）

== 効能 == 泉質に基づく効能として、以下が挙げられる<ref>[https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf 環境省] 温泉療養のイロハ③療養泉にはどんな種類があるの？</ref>。 * [[一般的適応症]] * [[自律神経不安定症]] * [[不眠症]] * [[うつ状態]]
== 代表的な温泉地 == *[[小原温泉]]（宮城県） *[[飯坂温泉]]（福島県） *[[土湯温泉]]（福島県） * [[箱根湯本温泉]]（神奈川県） * [[塩原温泉]]（栃木県） * [[伊東温泉]]（静岡県） * [[浅間温泉]]（長野県） * [[道後温泉]]（愛媛県）
== 脚注 == <references />
<!-- == 関連項目 == -->
{{温泉}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:たんしゆんおんせん}} [[Category:温泉の泉質]]

{{単一の出典|date=2018年8月12日 (日) 19:26 (UTC)}} '''単純温泉'''（たんじゅんおんせん）は、掲示用泉質名に基づく[[温泉]]の[[泉質]]の分類の一種。[[温泉#療養泉|療養泉]]に分類される泉質である。
== 概要 == 温泉水1kg中の溶存[[物質]]の含有量が1g未満の温泉が該当する。含有[[成分]]量が少ないことにより、刺激が少なく肌にやさしい。概ね無色透明で無味無臭。
単純温泉は成分の少ない単なる湯、質の低い温泉だと誤解されやすい。単純温泉とは、成分の含有量だけを評価したものであり成分の種類について規定したものではない。よって単純温泉とひとくくりにしても個々の泉質は多岐にわたるため単純な比較・分類はできない。成分の組成比によって、各種泉質の性質を帯びることもあるし、様々な成分を少量ずつ含んだバランスの良い泉質となっているものもある。
逆断層・正断層に分類される活断層がある地域では強いアルカリ性の単純温泉が見られることが多い。これは断層の岩盤が僅かに負の電荷を帯び、お湯が断層の隙間を通る中で陰イオンが交換されることによるという。
単純温泉と分類されるものの中には、[[モール泉]]も存在している。
== 新旧泉質名との対比 == 新旧泉質名では、以下に分類される。
{| class="wikitable" |+ 新旧泉質名の対応<ref>{{Cite web| |title=参考資料２新旧泉質名対照 |url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf |format=PDF |publisher=環境省自然環境局自然環境整備課温泉地保護利用推進室 |accessdate=2018-03-26 }}</ref> ! scope="col" id="旧泉質名" | 旧泉質名 ! scope="col" id="新泉質名" | 新泉質名 ! scope="col" id="液性" | 液性 |- | 単純温泉 || 単純温泉 || [[水素イオン指数|pH]]8.5未満。泉質は概ね[[中性 (酸塩基)|中性]]〜弱[[アルカリ性]]を示す。 |- | 単純温泉 || アルカリ性単純温泉 || pH8.5以上。泉質がアルカリ性を示すもの。 |}
== 泉質の定義 == [[温泉法]]による規定を満たした温泉のうち、温泉1kg中に含まれる溶存物質の含有量が総量1000mg未満のもの。
== 効能 == 泉質に基づく効能として、以下が挙げられる<ref>[https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf 環境省] 温泉療養のイロハ③療養泉にはどんな種類があるの？</ref>。 * [[一般的適応症]] * [[自律神経不安定症]] * [[不眠症]] * [[うつ状態]]
== 代表的な温泉地 == * [[小原温泉]]（宮城県） * [[飯坂温泉]]（福島県） * [[土湯温泉]]（福島県） * [[箱根湯本温泉]]（神奈川県） * [[塩原温泉]]（栃木県） * [[伊東温泉]]（静岡県） * [[浅間温泉]]（長野県） * [[道後温泉]]（愛媛県）
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} <references />
<!-- == 関連項目 == -->
{{温泉}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:たんしゆんおんせん}} [[Category:温泉の泉質]]

revision.comment: 「概要」節を作る事に反対はしないが、「定義」の節は最初に持ってきた方が判り易い。杓子定規に「概要」を最初の節にする必要は無い。ついでに、不適切な内部リンクの解除。宣伝の恐れの有る記述の除去。など
revision.text:
'''単純温泉'''（たんじゅんおんせん）とは、日本における掲示用泉質名に基づく[[温泉]]の[[泉質]]の分類の1つである。[[温泉#療養泉|療養泉]]に分類される。
== 泉質の定義 == [[温泉法]]による規定を満たした25 ℃以上の温泉のうち、温泉1 kg中に含まれる気体以外の溶存物質の含有量が総量1000 mg未満の温泉<ref name="Yamamura_47_h_p7">山村 順次 『47都道府県・温泉百科』 p.7 丸善出版 2015年12月30日発行 ISBN 978-4-621-08996-5</ref>。
== 概要 == 単純温泉は日本列島の各地に見られる、比較的ありふれた泉質である。温泉水1 kg中に溶存している気体以外の物質の含有量が1 g未満で、25 ℃以上で湧出する温泉が該当する。言い換えると、温泉水を蒸発させた際に残る物質が、比較的少ない温泉である。このため、単純温泉は成分の少ない単なる湯と誤解されたり、または質の低い温泉だと誤解される場合がある。しかし単純温泉とは、溶質の量だけを評価しただけの分類に過ぎず、何が溶けているのかについて規定していない。よって、単純温泉と一口に言っても、個々の泉質は多岐にわたるため、単純温泉に分類されていても、一定の性質が見られる'''わけではない'''。例えば、含有する溶質の組成比によって、他の泉質の性質を帯びた単純温泉も有る。また、様々な成分を少量ずつ含んだ単純温泉も存在する。さらに、単純温泉と分類される温泉の中には、[[モール泉]]すらも存在している。例えば、[[十勝川温泉]]はモール層から色の付いた単純温泉が湧出しており、独特であるとして[[北海道遺産]]にも指定されている<ref>山村 順次 『47都道府県・温泉百科』 p.53 丸善出版 2015年12月30日発行 ISBN 978-4-621-08996-5</ref>。
== 新旧泉質名との対比 == 新旧泉質名では、以下に分類される。
{| class="wikitable" |+ 新旧泉質名の対応<ref>{{Cite web| |title=参考資料２新旧泉質名対照 |url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf |format=PDF |publisher=環境省自然環境局自然環境整備課温泉地保護利用推進室 |accessdate=2018-03-26 }}</ref> ! scope="col" id="旧泉質名" | 旧泉質名 ! scope="col" id="新泉質名" | 新泉質名 ! scope="col" id="液性" | 液性 |- | 単純温泉 || 単純温泉 || [[水素イオン指数|pH]]8.5未満。 |- | 単純温泉 || アルカリ性単純温泉 || pH8.5以上<ref name="Yamamura_47_h_p7">山村 順次 『47都道府県・温泉百科』 p.7 丸善出版 2015年12月30日発行 ISBN 978-4-621-08996-5</ref>。 |}
== 効能 == 泉質に基づく効能として、以下が挙げられる<ref>[https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf 環境省] 温泉療養のイロハ③療養泉にはどんな種類があるの？</ref>。 * [[一般的適応症]] * [[不眠症]] <!--== 代表的な温泉地 ==もしも、この節を作るならば、代表的と検証できる出典を提示してください。提示されていない場合は、宣伝として除去します。--> == 出典 == <references/>
{{温泉}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:たんしゆんおんせん}} [[Category:温泉の泉質]]

revision.text:
'''Simple Hot Springs''' (単純温泉, Tanjun Onsen) is a classification of {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} water quality based on signage standards in Japan. It is categorized under {{ill|Therapeutic hot springs|ja|温泉#療養泉}}.
== Definition of Water Quality == Among hot springs regulated by the {{ill|Hot Springs Law|ja|温泉法}}, those with a temperature of 25 °C or higher containing less than 1000 milligrams of dissolved substances per kilogram of water, excluding gases, are classified as simple hot springs{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}.
== Overview == Simple hot springs are relatively common across the {{ill|Japanese archipelago|ja|日本列島}}. They are defined by containing less than 1 gram of dissolved substances per kilogram of water while being at least 25 °C at the source. In simpler terms, these springs leave relatively few residues upon evaporation. This has led to misunderstandings, with some perceiving simple hot springs as "mere water" or of lower quality. However, the classification focuses solely on the amount of solute, not its composition. Consequently, simple hot springs encompass a wide variety of water qualities.
Some simple hot springs exhibit characteristics of other types of springs based on their solute composition ratios. Others contain trace amounts of diverse substances. Notably, even {{ill|moor springs|ja|モール泉}} can be categorized as simple hot springs. For instance, the {{ill|Tokachigawa Onsen|ja|十勝川温泉}} in Hokkaido produces a colored simple hot spring from moor layers and is recognized as a {{ill|Hokkaido Heritage|ja|北海道遺産}} for its uniqueness{{sfn|山村|2015|p=53}}.
== Comparison of Old and New Classifications == The correspondence between old and new classifications is as follows:
{| class="wikitable" |+ Comparison of Old and New Water Quality Names{{r|新旧泉質名対照表}} ! Old Classification ! New Classification ! Acidity (pH) |- | Simple Hot Spring || Simple Hot Spring || Less than 8.5 |- | Simple Hot Spring || Alkaline Simple Hot Spring || 8.5 or higher{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}} |}
== Benefits == Based on water quality, the following health benefits are associated with simple hot springs{{r|温泉療養のイロハ}}: * {{ill|General Indications|ja|一般的適応症}} * [[Insomnia]]
== References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist|refs= <ref name="温泉療養のイロハ">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20170521191755/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | title = 温泉療養のイロハ | format = PDF | publisher = Ministry of the Environment | page = 3 | accessdate = 2020-01-22 | archivedate = 2017-05-21 }}</ref> <ref name="新旧泉質名対照表">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20180326202405/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | title = 参考資料２新旧泉質名対照 | format = [[Portable Document Format|PDF]] | publisher = Ministry of the Environment, Department of Nature Conservation, Hot Springs Protection and Utilization Promotion Office | accessdate = 2018-03-26 | archivedate = 2018-03-26 }}</ref> }}
== Further Reading == * {{citation|和書 | last = 山村 | first = 順次 | title = 47都道府県・温泉百科 | publisher = 丸善出版 | date = 2015-12-30 | isbn = 978-4-621-08996-5 }}
{{Onsen}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:Tanjun Onsen}} [[Category:original pages]] [[Category:Hot spring water quality classifications]]
[[Category:original pages]]
[[Category:original pages]]
[[Category:original pages]] [[ja:単純温泉]]

'''Simple Hot Springs''' (単純温泉, Tanjun Onsen) is a classification of {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} water quality based on signage standards in Japan. It is categorized under {{ill|Therapeutic hot springs|ja|温泉#療養泉}}.

== Overview == Simple hot springs are relatively common across the {{ill|Japanese archipelago|ja|日本列島}}. They are defined by containing less than 1 gram of dissolved substances per kilogram of water while being at least 25 °C at the source. In simpler terms, these springs leave relatively few residues upon evaporation. This has led to misunderstandings, with some perceiving simple hot springs as "mere water" or of lower quality. However, the classification focuses solely on the amount of solute, not its composition. Consequently, simple hot springs encompass a wide variety of water qualities.
Some simple hot springs exhibit characteristics of other types of springs based on their solute composition ratios. Others contain trace amounts of diverse substances. Notably, even {{ill|moor springs|ja|モール泉}} can be categorized as simple hot springs. For instance, the {{ill|Tokachigawa Onsen|ja|十勝川温泉}} in Hokkaido produces a colored simple hot spring from moor layers and is recognized as a {{ill|Hokkaido Heritage|ja|北海道遺産}} for its uniqueness{{sfn|山村|2015|p=53}}.
== Comparison of Old and New Classifications == The correspondence between old and new classifications is as follows:
{| class="wikitable" |+ Comparison of Old and New Water Quality Names{{r|新旧泉質名対照表}} ! Old Classification ! New Classification ! Acidity (pH) |- | Simple Hot Spring || Simple Hot Spring || Less than 8.5 |- | Simple Hot Spring || Alkaline Simple Hot Spring || 8.5 or higher{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}} |}
== Benefits == Based on water quality, the following health benefits are associated with simple hot springs{{r|温泉療養のイロハ}}: * {{ill|General Indications|ja|一般的適応症}} * [[Insomnia]]
== References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist|refs= <ref name="温泉療養のイロハ">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20170521191755/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | title = 温泉療養のイロハ | format = PDF | publisher = Ministry of the Environment | page = 3 | accessdate = 2020-01-22 | archivedate = 2017-05-21 }}</ref> <ref name="新旧泉質名対照表">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20180326202405/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | title = 参考資料２新旧泉質名対照 | format = [[Portable Document Format|PDF]] | publisher = Ministry of the Environment, Department of Nature Conservation, Hot Springs Protection and Utilization Promotion Office | accessdate = 2018-03-26 | archivedate = 2018-03-26 }}</ref> }}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:単純温泉]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11408869]] Wikidata name: tanjun onsen [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=This is questionable as I think it requires [[WP:MEDRS]] and I am surprised that jawiki has these claims not only not medically sourced but without medically reliable sources[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:11, 14 March 2025 (UTC)}}
[[File:Kuronagi-onsen01.JPG|link=https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E3%83%95%E3%82%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%AB:Kuronagi-onsen01.JPG|right|thumb|'''単純温泉である黒薙温泉露天風呂''']] '''Simple Hot Springs''' (単純温泉, Tanjun Onsen) is a classification of [[:en:Onsen|Onsen]]water quality based on signage standards in Japan. It is categorized under {{ill|Therapeutic hot springs|ja|温泉#療養泉|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Therapeutic hot springs|qq=|1=onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q655311}}
== Definition of Water Quality == Among hot springs regulated by the {{ill|Hot Springs Law|ja|温泉法|1=Onsen Act|1=Onsen Act|1=Onsen Act|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Springs Law|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen Act|qq=}} , those with a temperature of 25 °C or higher containing less than 1000 milligrams of dissolved substances per kilogram of water, excluding gases, are classified as simple hot springs{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
== Overview == Simple hot springs are relatively common across the [[:en:Japanese archipelago|Japanese archipelago]] . They are defined by containing less than 1 gram of dissolved substances per kilogram of water while being at least 25 °C at the source. In simpler terms, these springs leave relatively few residues upon evaporation. This has led to misunderstandings, with some perceiving simple hot springs as "mere water" or of lower quality. However, the classification focuses solely on the amount of solute, not its composition. Consequently, simple hot springs encompass a wide variety of water qualities.
Some simple hot springs exhibit characteristics of other types of springs based on their solute composition ratios. Others contain trace amounts of diverse substances. Notably, even {{ill|moor springs|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot springs|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/moor springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Moor hot springs|qq=}}<nowiki/>can be categorized as simple hot springs. For instance, the {{ill|Tokachigawa Onsen|ja|十勝川温泉|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokachigawa Onsen|qq=}} in Hokkaido produces a colored simple hot spring from moor layers and is recognized as a [[:en:Hokkaido Heritage|Hokkaido Heritage]] for its uniqueness{{sfn|山村|2015|p=53}}
== Comparison of Old and New Classifications == The correspondence between old and new classifications is as follows:
{| class="wikitable" |+ Comparison of Old and New Water Quality Names{{r|新旧泉質名対照表}}
! Old Classification ! New Classification ! Acidity (pH) |- | Simple Hot Spring || Simple Hot Spring || Less than 8.5 |- | Simple Hot Spring || Alkaline Simple Hot Spring || 8.5 or higher{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
|}
== Benefits == Based on water quality, the following health benefits are associated with simple hot springs{{r|温泉療養のイロハ}} * {{ill|General Indications|ja|一般的適応症|1=General Indications for hot spring use|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications for hot spring use|qq=}}
* [[:en:Insomnia|Insomnia]]
== References ==
{{reflist|refs= <ref name="温泉療養のイロハ">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20170521191755/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | title = 温泉療養のイロハ | format = PDF | publisher = Ministry of the Environment | page = 3 | accessdate = 2020-01-22 | archivedate = 2017-05-21 }} </ref> <ref name="新旧泉質名対照表">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20180326202405/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | title = 参考資料２新旧泉質名対照 | format = [[Portable Document Format|PDF]] | publisher = Ministry of the Environment, Department of Nature Conservation, Hot Springs Protection and Utilization Promotion Office | accessdate = 2018-03-26 | archivedate = 2018-03-26 }} </ref> }}
== Further Reading == * {{citation|和書 | last = 山村 | first = 順次 | title = 47都道府県・温泉百科 | publisher = 丸善出版 | date = 2015-12-30 | isbn = 978-4-621-08996-5 }}

== Comparison of Old and New Classifications == The correspondence between old and new classifications is as follows:
{| class="wikitable" |+ Comparison of Old and New Water Quality Names{{r|新旧泉質名対照表}}
! Old Classification ! New Classification ! Acidity (pH) |- | Simple Hot Spring || Simple Hot Spring || Less than 8.5 |- | Simple Hot Spring || Alkaline Simple Hot Spring || 8.5 or higher{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
|}
== Benefits == Based on water quality, the following health benefits are associated with simple hot springs{{r|温泉療養のイロハ}} * {{ill|General Indications|ja|一般的適応症|1=General Indications for hot spring use|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications for hot spring use|qq=}}
* [[:en:Insomnia|Insomnia]]

{{reflist|refs= <ref name="温泉療養のイロハ">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20170521191755/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | title = 温泉療養のイロハ | format = PDF | publisher = Ministry of the Environment | page = 3 | accessdate = 2020-01-22 | archivedate = 2017-05-21 }} </ref> <ref name="新旧泉質名対照表">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20180326202405/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | title = 参考資料２新旧泉質名対照 | format = [[Portable Document Format|PDF]] | publisher = Ministry of the Environment, Department of Nature Conservation, Hot Springs Protection and Utilization Promotion Office | accessdate = 2018-03-26 | archivedate = 2018-03-26 }} </ref> }}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:単純温泉]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11408869]] Wikidata name: tanjun onsen [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=This is questionable as I think it requires [[WP:MEDRS]] and I am surprised that jawiki has these claims not only not medically sourced but without medically reliable sources[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:11, 14 March 2025 (UTC)}}
[[File:Kuronagi-onsen01.JPG|link=https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E3%83%95%E3%82%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%AB:Kuronagi-onsen01.JPG|right|thumb|'''単純温泉である黒薙温泉露天風呂''']] '''Simple Hot Springs''' (単純温泉, Tanjun Onsen) is a classification of [[:en:Onsen|Onsen]]water quality based on signage standards in Japan. It is categorized under {{ill|Therapeutic hot springs|ja|温泉#療養泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Therapeutic hot springs|1=onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q655311}}
== Definition of Water Quality == Among hot springs regulated by the {{ill|Hot Springs Law|ja|温泉法|1=Onsen Act|1=Onsen Act|1=Onsen Act|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Springs Law|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen Act|qq=}} , those with a temperature of 25 °C or higher containing less than 1000 milligrams of dissolved substances per kilogram of water, excluding gases, are classified as simple hot springs{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
== Overview == Simple hot springs are relatively common across the [[:en:Japanese archipelago|Japanese archipelago]] . They are defined by containing less than 1 gram of dissolved substances per kilogram of water while being at least 25 °C at the source. In simpler terms, these springs leave relatively few residues upon evaporation. This has led to misunderstandings, with some perceiving simple hot springs as "mere water" or of lower quality. However, the classification focuses solely on the amount of solute, not its composition. Consequently, simple hot springs encompass a wide variety of water qualities.
Some simple hot springs exhibit characteristics of other types of springs based on their solute composition ratios. Others contain trace amounts of diverse substances. Notably, even {{ill|moor springs|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/moor springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Moor hot springs|qq=}}<nowiki/>can be categorized as simple hot springs. For instance, the {{ill|Tokachigawa Onsen|ja|十勝川温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokachigawa Onsen|qq=}} in Hokkaido produces a colored simple hot spring from moor layers and is recognized as a [[:en:Hokkaido Heritage|Hokkaido Heritage]] for its uniqueness{{sfn|山村|2015|p=53}}
== Comparison of Old and New Classifications == The correspondence between old and new classifications is as follows:
{| class="wikitable" |+ Comparison of Old and New Water Quality Names{{r|新旧泉質名対照表}}
! Old Classification ! New Classification ! Acidity (pH) |- | Simple Hot Spring || Simple Hot Spring || Less than 8.5 |- | Simple Hot Spring || Alkaline Simple Hot Spring || 8.5 or higher{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
|}
== Benefits == Based on water quality, the following health benefits are associated with simple hot springs{{r|温泉療養のイロハ}} * {{ill|General Indications|ja|一般的適応症|1=General Indications for hot spring use|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications for hot spring use|qq=}}
* [[:en:Insomnia|Insomnia]]
== References ==
{{reflist|refs= <ref name="温泉療養のイロハ">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20170521191755/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | title = 温泉療養のイロハ | format = PDF | publisher = Ministry of the Environment | page = 3 | accessdate = 2020-01-22 | archivedate = 2017-05-21 }} </ref> <ref name="新旧泉質名対照表">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20180326202405/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | title = 参考資料２新旧泉質名対照 | format = [[Portable Document Format|PDF]] | publisher = Ministry of the Environment, Department of Nature Conservation, Hot Springs Protection and Utilization Promotion Office | accessdate = 2018-03-26 | archivedate = 2018-03-26 }} </ref> }}

== Comparison of Old and New Classifications == The correspondence between old and new classifications is as follows:
{| class="wikitable" |+ Comparison of Old and New Water Quality Names{{r|新旧泉質名対照表}}
! Old Classification ! New Classification ! Acidity (pH) |- | Simple Hot Spring || Simple Hot Spring || Less than 8.5 |- | Simple Hot Spring || Alkaline Simple Hot Spring || 8.5 or higher{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
|}
== Benefits == Based on water quality, the following health benefits are associated with simple hot springs{{r|温泉療養のイロハ}} * {{ill|General Indications|ja|一般的適応症|1=General Indications for hot spring use|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications for hot spring use|qq=}}
* [[:en:Insomnia|Insomnia]]
== References ==
{{reflist|refs= <ref name="温泉療養のイロハ">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20170521191755/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | title = 温泉療養のイロハ | format = PDF | publisher = Ministry of the Environment | page = 3 | accessdate = 2020-01-22 | archivedate = 2017-05-21 }} </ref> <ref name="新旧泉質名対照表">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20180326202405/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | title = 参考資料２新旧泉質名対照 | format = [[Portable Document Format|PDF]] | publisher = Ministry of the Environment, Department of Nature Conservation, Hot Springs Protection and Utilization Promotion Office | accessdate = 2018-03-26 | archivedate = 2018-03-26 }} </ref> }}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:単純温泉]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11408869]] Wikidata name: tanjun onsen [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=This is questionable as I think it requires [[WP:MEDRS]] and I am surprised that jawiki has these claims not only not medically sourced but without medically reliable sources[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:11, 14 March 2025 (UTC)}}
[[File:Kuronagi-onsen01.JPG|link=https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E3%83%95%E3%82%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%AB:Kuronagi-onsen01.JPG|right|thumb|'''単純温泉である黒薙温泉露天風呂''']] '''Simple Hot Springs''' (単純温泉, Tanjun Onsen) is a classification of [[:en:Onsen|Onsen]]water quality based on signage standards in Japan. It is categorized under {{ill|Therapeutic hot springs|ja|温泉#療養泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Therapeutic hot springs|1=onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q655311}}
== Definition of Water Quality == Among hot springs regulated by the {{ill|Hot Springs Law|ja|温泉法|1=Onsen Act|1=Onsen Act|1=Onsen Act|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Springs Law|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen Act|qq=}} , those with a temperature of 25 °C or higher containing less than 1000 milligrams of dissolved substances per kilogram of water, excluding gases, are classified as simple hot springs{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
== Overview == Simple hot springs are relatively common across the [[:en:Japanese archipelago|Japanese archipelago]] . They are defined by containing less than 1 gram of dissolved substances per kilogram of water while being at least 25 °C at the source. In simpler terms, these springs leave relatively few residues upon evaporation. This has led to misunderstandings, with some perceiving simple hot springs as "mere water" or of lower quality. However, the classification focuses solely on the amount of solute, not its composition. Consequently, simple hot springs encompass a wide variety of water qualities.
Some simple hot springs exhibit characteristics of other types of springs based on their solute composition ratios. Others contain trace amounts of diverse substances. Notably, even {{ill|moor springs|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/moor springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Moor hot springs|qq=}}<nowiki/>can be categorized as simple hot springs. For instance, the {{ill|Tokachigawa Onsen|ja|十勝川温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokachigawa Onsen|qq=}} in Hokkaido produces a colored simple hot spring from moor layers and is recognized as a [[:en:Hokkaido Heritage|Hokkaido Heritage]] for its uniqueness{{sfn|山村|2015|p=53}}
== Comparison of Old and New Classifications == The correspondence between old and new classifications is as follows:
{| class="wikitable" |+ Comparison of Old and New Water Quality Names{{r|新旧泉質名対照表}}
! Old Classification ! New Classification ! Acidity (pH) |- | Simple Hot Spring || Simple Hot Spring || Less than 8.5 |- | Simple Hot Spring || Alkaline Simple Hot Spring || 8.5 or higher{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
|}
== Benefits == Based on water quality, the following health benefits are associated with simple hot springs{{r|温泉療養のイロハ}} * {{ill|General Indications|ja|一般的適応症|1=General Indications for hot spring use|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications for hot spring use|qq=}}
* [[:en:Insomnia|Insomnia]]
== References ==
{{reflist|refs= <ref name="温泉療養のイロハ">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20170521191755/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | title = 温泉療養のイロハ | format = PDF | publisher = Ministry of the Environment | page = 3 | accessdate = 2020-01-22 | archivedate = 2017-05-21 }} </ref> <ref name="新旧泉質名対照表">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20180326202405/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | title = 参考資料２新旧泉質名対照 | format = [[Portable Document Format|PDF]] | publisher = Ministry of the Environment, Department of Nature Conservation, Hot Springs Protection and Utilization Promotion Office | accessdate = 2018-03-26 | archivedate = 2018-03-26 }} </ref> }}

revision.comment: Consolidate multiple wikidata link templates into single one at end
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:単純温泉]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11408869]] Wikidata name: tanjun onsen [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=This is questionable as I think it requires [[WP:MEDRS]] and I am surprised that jawiki has these claims not only not medically sourced but without medically reliable sources[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:11, 14 March 2025 (UTC)}}
[[File:Kuronagi-onsen01.JPG|link=https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E3%83%95%E3%82%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%AB:Kuronagi-onsen01.JPG|right|thumb|'''単純温泉である黒薙温泉露天風呂''']] '''Simple Hot Springs''' (単純温泉, Tanjun Onsen) is a classification of [[:en:Onsen|Onsen]]water quality based on signage standards in Japan. It is categorized under {{ill|Therapeutic hot springs|ja|温泉#療養泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Therapeutic hot springs|1=onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q655311}}
== Definition of Water Quality == Among hot springs regulated by the {{ill|Hot Springs Law|ja|温泉法|1=Onsen Act|1=Onsen Act|1=Onsen Act|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Springs Law|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen Act|qq=}} , those with a temperature of 25 °C or higher containing less than 1000 milligrams of dissolved substances per kilogram of water, excluding gases, are classified as simple hot springs{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
== Overview == Simple hot springs are relatively common across the [[:en:Japanese archipelago|Japanese archipelago]] . They are defined by containing less than 1 gram of dissolved substances per kilogram of water while being at least 25 °C at the source. In simpler terms, these springs leave relatively few residues upon evaporation. This has led to misunderstandings, with some perceiving simple hot springs as "mere water" or of lower quality. However, the classification focuses solely on the amount of solute, not its composition. Consequently, simple hot springs encompass a wide variety of water qualities.
Some simple hot springs exhibit characteristics of other types of springs based on their solute composition ratios. Others contain trace amounts of diverse substances. Notably, even {{ill|moor springs|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/moor springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Moor hot springs|qq=}}<nowiki/>can be categorized as simple hot springs. For instance, the {{ill|Tokachigawa Onsen|ja|十勝川温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokachigawa Onsen|qq=}} in Hokkaido produces a colored simple hot spring from moor layers and is recognized as a [[:en:Hokkaido Heritage|Hokkaido Heritage]] for its uniqueness{{sfn|山村|2015|p=53}}
== Comparison of Old and New Classifications == The correspondence between old and new classifications is as follows:
{| class="wikitable" |+ Comparison of Old and New Water Quality Names{{r|新旧泉質名対照表}}
! Old Classification ! New Classification ! Acidity (pH) |- | Simple Hot Spring || Simple Hot Spring || Less than 8.5 |- | Simple Hot Spring || Alkaline Simple Hot Spring || 8.5 or higher{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
|}
== Benefits == Based on water quality, the following health benefits are associated with simple hot springs{{r|温泉療養のイロハ}} * {{ill|General Indications|ja|一般的適応症|1=General Indications for hot spring use|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications for hot spring use|qq=}}
* [[:en:Insomnia|Insomnia]]
== References ==
{{reflist|refs= <ref name="温泉療養のイロハ">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20170521191755/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | title = 温泉療養のイロハ | format = PDF | publisher = Ministry of the Environment | page = 3 | accessdate = 2020-01-22 | archivedate = 2017-05-21 }} </ref> <ref name="新旧泉質名対照表">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20180326202405/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | title = 参考資料２新旧泉質名対照 | format = [[Portable Document Format|PDF]] | publisher = Ministry of the Environment, Department of Nature Conservation, Hot Springs Protection and Utilization Promotion Office | accessdate = 2018-03-26 | archivedate = 2018-03-26 }} </ref> }}
== Further Reading == * {{citation|和書 | last = 山村 | first = 順次 | title = 47都道府県・温泉百科 | publisher = 丸善出版 | date = 2015-12-30 | isbn = 978-4-621-08996-5 }}
{{Onsen}}
{{translated page|ja|単純温泉|version=100477303|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[Category:Onsens]] }}

! Old Classification ! New Classification ! Acidity (pH) |- | Simple Hot Spring || Simple Hot Spring || Less than 8.5 |- | Simple Hot Spring || Alkaline Simple Hot Spring || 8.5 or higher{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}

* [[:en:Insomnia|Insomnia]]

{{reflist|refs= <ref name="温泉療養のイロハ">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20170521191755/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | title = 温泉療養のイロハ | format = PDF | publisher = Ministry of the Environment | page = 3 | accessdate = 2020-01-22 | archivedate = 2017-05-21 }} </ref> <ref name="新旧泉質名対照表">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20180326202405/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | title = 参考資料２新旧泉質名対照 | format = [[Portable Document Format|PDF]] | publisher = Ministry of the Environment, Department of Nature Conservation, Hot Springs Protection and Utilization Promotion Office | accessdate = 2018-03-26 | archivedate = 2018-03-26 }} </ref> }}

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
{{wikidata link|Q11408869}} [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Hot Spring Types]] [[Category:Onsens]] [[Category:Simple Hot Springs]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:単純温泉]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:単純温泉]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:単純温泉]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11408869]] Wikidata name: tanjun onsen [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=This is questionable as I think it requires [[WP:MEDRS]] and I am surprised that jawiki has these claims not only not medically sourced but without medically reliable sources[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:11, 14 March 2025 (UTC)}}
[[File:Kuronagi-onsen01.JPG|link=https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E3%83%95%E3%82%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%AB:Kuronagi-onsen01.JPG|right|thumb|'''単純温泉である黒薙温泉露天風呂''']] '''Simple Hot Springs''' (単純温泉, Tanjun Onsen) is a classification of [[:en:Onsen|Onsen]]water quality based on signage standards in Japan. It is categorized under {{ill|Therapeutic hot springs|ja|温泉#療養泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Therapeutic hot springs|1=onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q655311}}
== Definition of Water Quality == Among hot springs regulated by the {{ill|Hot Springs Law|ja|温泉法|1=Onsen Act|1=Onsen Act|1=Onsen Act|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Springs Law|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen Act|qq=}} , those with a temperature of 25 °C or higher containing less than 1000 milligrams of dissolved substances per kilogram of water, excluding gases, are classified as simple hot springs{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
== Overview == Simple hot springs are relatively common across the [[:en:Japanese archipelago|Japanese archipelago]] . They are defined by containing less than 1 gram of dissolved substances per kilogram of water while being at least 25 °C at the source. In simpler terms, these springs leave relatively few residues upon evaporation. This has led to misunderstandings, with some perceiving simple hot springs as "mere water" or of lower quality. However, the classification focuses solely on the amount of solute, not its composition. Consequently, simple hot springs encompass a wide variety of water qualities.
Some simple hot springs exhibit characteristics of other types of springs based on their solute composition ratios. Others contain trace amounts of diverse substances. Notably, even {{ill|moor springs|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/moor springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Moor hot springs|qq=}}<nowiki/>can be categorized as simple hot springs. For instance, the {{ill|Tokachigawa Onsen|ja|十勝川温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokachigawa Onsen|qq=}} in Hokkaido produces a colored simple hot spring from moor layers and is recognized as a [[:en:Hokkaido Heritage|Hokkaido Heritage]] for its uniqueness{{sfn|山村|2015|p=53}}
== Comparison of Old and New Classifications == The correspondence between old and new classifications is as follows:
{| class="wikitable" |+ Comparison of Old and New Water Quality Names{{r|新旧泉質名対照表}}
! Old Classification ! New Classification ! Acidity (pH) |- | Simple Hot Spring || Simple Hot Spring || Less than 8.5 |- | Simple Hot Spring || Alkaline Simple Hot Spring || 8.5 or higher{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
|}
== Benefits == Based on water quality, the following health benefits are associated with simple hot springs{{r|温泉療養のイロハ}} * {{ill|General Indications|ja|一般的適応症|1=General Indications for hot spring use|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications for hot spring use|qq=}}
* [[:en:Insomnia|Insomnia]]

Some simple hot springs exhibit characteristics of other types of springs based on their solute composition ratios. Others contain trace amounts of diverse substances. Notably, even {{ill|moor springs|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/moor springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Moor hot springs|qq=}}<nowiki/>can be categorized as simple hot springs. For instance, the {{ill|Tokachigawa Onsen|ja|十勝川温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokachigawa Onsen|qq=}} in Hokkaido produces a colored simple hot spring from moor layers and is recognized as a [[:en:Hokkaido Heritage|Hokkaido Heritage]] for its uniqueness{{sfn|山村|2015|p=53}}
== Comparison of Old and New Classifications == The correspondence between old and new classifications is as follows:
{| class="wikitable" |+ Comparison of Old and New Water Quality Names{{r|新旧泉質名対照表}}
! Old Classification ! New Classification ! Acidity (pH) |- | Simple Hot Spring || Simple Hot Spring || Less than 8.5 |- | Simple Hot Spring || Alkaline Simple Hot Spring || 8.5 or higher{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
|}
== Benefits == Based on water quality, the following health benefits are associated with simple hot springs{{r|温泉療養のイロハ}} * {{ill|General Indications|ja|一般的適応症|1=General Indications for hot spring use|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications for hot spring use|qq=}}
* [[:en:Insomnia|Insomnia]]

[[File:Kuronagi-onsen01.JPG|link=https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E3%83%95%E3%82%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%AB:Kuronagi-onsen01.JPG|right|thumb|'''単純温泉である黒薙温泉露天風呂''']] '''Simple Hot Springs''' (単純温泉, Tanjun Onsen) is a classification of {{ill|Onsen|en|Onsen|WD=Q655311|lt=Onsen}}water quality based on signage standards in Japan. It is categorized under {{ill|Therapeutic hot springs|ja|温泉#療養泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Therapeutic hot springs|1=onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q655311}}
== Definition of Water Quality == Among hot springs regulated by the {{ill|Hot Springs Law|ja|温泉法|1=Onsen Act|1=Onsen Act|1=Onsen Act|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Springs Law|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen Act|qq=}} , those with a temperature of 25 °C or higher containing less than 1000 milligrams of dissolved substances per kilogram of water, excluding gases, are classified as simple hot springs{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
== Overview == Simple hot springs are relatively common across the {{ill|Japanese archipelago|en|Japanese archipelago|WD=Q841337|lt=Japanese archipelago}} . They are defined by containing less than 1 gram of dissolved substances per kilogram of water while being at least 25 °C at the source. In simpler terms, these springs leave relatively few residues upon evaporation. This has led to misunderstandings, with some perceiving simple hot springs as "mere water" or of lower quality. However, the classification focuses solely on the amount of solute, not its composition. Consequently, simple hot springs encompass a wide variety of water qualities.
Some simple hot springs exhibit characteristics of other types of springs based on their solute composition ratios. Others contain trace amounts of diverse substances. Notably, even {{ill|moor springs|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/moor springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Moor hot springs|qq=}}<nowiki/>can be categorized as simple hot springs. For instance, the {{ill|Tokachigawa Onsen|ja|十勝川温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokachigawa Onsen|qq=}} in Hokkaido produces a colored simple hot spring from moor layers and is recognized as a {{ill|Hokkaido Heritage|en|Hokkaido Heritage|WD=Q11403686|lt=Hokkaido Heritage}} for its uniqueness{{sfn|山村|2015|p=53}}
== Comparison of Old and New Classifications == The correspondence between old and new classifications is as follows:
{| class="wikitable" |+ Comparison of Old and New Water Quality Names{{r|新旧泉質名対照表}}
! Old Classification ! New Classification ! Acidity (pH) |- | Simple Hot Spring || Simple Hot Spring || Less than 8.5 |- | Simple Hot Spring || Alkaline Simple Hot Spring || 8.5 or higher{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
|}
== Benefits == Based on water quality, the following health benefits are associated with simple hot springs{{r|温泉療養のイロハ}} * {{ill|General Indications|ja|一般的適応症|1=General Indications for hot spring use|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications for hot spring use|qq=}}
* {{ill|Insomnia|en|Insomnia|WD=Q1869874|lt=Insomnia}}
== References ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:単純温泉]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:単純温泉]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:単純温泉]]
[[File:Kuronagi-onsen01.JPG|link=https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E3%83%95%E3%82%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%AB:Kuronagi-onsen01.JPG|right|thumb|'''単純温泉である黒薙温泉露天風呂''']] '''Simple Hot Springs''' (単純温泉, Tanjun Onsen) is a classification of {{ill|Onsen|en|Onsen|WD=Q655311|lt=Onsen}}water quality based on signage standards in Japan. It is categorized under {{ill|Therapeutic hot springs|ja|温泉#療養泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Therapeutic hot springs|1=onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q655311}}
== Definition of Water Quality == Among hot springs regulated by the {{ill|Hot Springs Law|ja|温泉法|1=Onsen Act|1=Onsen Act|1=Onsen Act|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Springs Law|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen Act|qq=}} , those with a temperature of 25 °C or higher containing less than 1000 milligrams of dissolved substances per kilogram of water, excluding gases, are classified as simple hot springs{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
== Overview == Simple hot springs are relatively common across the {{ill|Japanese archipelago|en|Japanese archipelago|WD=Q841337|lt=Japanese archipelago}} . They are defined by containing less than 1 gram of dissolved substances per kilogram of water while being at least 25 °C at the source. In simpler terms, these springs leave relatively few residues upon evaporation. This has led to misunderstandings, with some perceiving simple hot springs as "mere water" or of lower quality. However, the classification focuses solely on the amount of solute, not its composition. Consequently, simple hot springs encompass a wide variety of water qualities.
Some simple hot springs exhibit characteristics of other types of springs based on their solute composition ratios. Others contain trace amounts of diverse substances. Notably, even {{ill|moor springs|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/moor springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Moor hot springs|qq=}}<nowiki/>can be categorized as simple hot springs. For instance, the {{ill|Tokachigawa Onsen|ja|十勝川温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokachigawa Onsen|qq=}} in Hokkaido produces a colored simple hot spring from moor layers and is recognized as a {{ill|Hokkaido Heritage|en|Hokkaido Heritage|WD=Q11403686|lt=Hokkaido Heritage}} for its uniqueness{{sfn|山村|2015|p=53}}
== Comparison of Old and New Classifications == The correspondence between old and new classifications is as follows:
{| class="wikitable" |+ Comparison of Old and New Water Quality Names{{r|新旧泉質名対照表}}
! Old Classification ! New Classification ! Acidity (pH) |- | Simple Hot Spring || Simple Hot Spring || Less than 8.5 |- | Simple Hot Spring || Alkaline Simple Hot Spring || 8.5 or higher{{sfn|山村|2015|p=7}}
|}
== Benefits == Based on water quality, the following health benefits are associated with simple hot springs{{r|温泉療養のイロハ}} * {{ill|General Indications|ja|一般的適応症|1=General Indications for hot spring use|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications|13=User:Immanuelle/General Indications for hot spring use|qq=}}
* {{ill|Insomnia|en|Insomnia|WD=Q1869874|lt=Insomnia}}
== References ==
{{reflist|refs= <ref name="温泉療養のイロハ">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20170521191755/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/ha.pdf | title = 温泉療養のイロハ | format = PDF | publisher = Ministry of the Environment | page = 3 | accessdate = 2020-01-22 | archivedate = 2017-05-21 }} </ref> <ref name="新旧泉質名対照表">{{cite web | url = https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | url-status = live | archiveurl = https://web.archive.org/web/20180326202405/env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/senshitsumei26.pdf | title = 参考資料２新旧泉質名対照 | format = [[Portable Document Format|PDF]] | publisher = Ministry of the Environment, Department of Nature Conservation, Hot Springs Protection and Utilization Promotion Office | accessdate = 2018-03-26 | archivedate = 2018-03-26 }} </ref> }}
== Further Reading == * {{citation|和書 | last = 山村 | first = 順次 | title = 47都道府県・温泉百科 | publisher = 丸善出版 | date = 2015-12-30 | isbn = 978-4-621-08996-5 }}
{{Onsen}}
{{translated page|ja|単純温泉|version=100477303|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:単純温泉]]

* {{ill|Insomnia|en|Insomnia|WD=Q1869874|lt=Insomnia|1=Insomnia}}
